titleStmt.title: SII 17.586: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 586. (A.R. No. 541 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple, right of entrance.
This record commences with the praśasti pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc., of Kulōttuṅga I.

It states that the sabhā of Pudukkuḍi, a brahmadēya in Tirūvārūr-kkūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu, having assembled at the Dēvāśriyan sold and made tax-free various pieces of lands with all rights of irrigation to Tribhuvanamuḍaiyān Irājēndraśōḻan alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Malaiyarājapanmar, a paṇimagan, resident in the place, who paid 24(1/4) kaḻañju of gold and donated the land for daily worship and offerings to the deity Umai Naṅgai set up at the Ulaguyyakkoṇḍa-kāmakkōṭṭam. The treasury is called Tyāgavinōdaṉ and the standard weight stone is stated to be equivalent to Tyāgavinōdaṉ-māḍai.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātuviḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa ṉilamakaḷ ṉilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimai yiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭicūṭi minavarnilaikeṭavillavaṟkulaitara Eṉaimaṉnavar Iḻiya luṟṟaḻitara tikkaṉaittum taṉcakkaranaṭātti virasi ṅāsanattu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecaripatmar
tribhuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 4 vatu keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurkkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam putukkuṭiyil Uṟuppuṭṭur vāmanapaṭṭa num Uṟuppuṭṭur nārāyaṇanum Uṟuppuṭ(ṭa)ṭur kaṉtaiya paṭṭanum Iḻakkantiṟattu saṅhārasiṅkaṭṭanum kūviṇṭur kovindabha
ṭṭanum Uḷḷiṭṭa sabhaiyom tiruvārur t[evāśrī] vaṇattu kūṭṭaṅkuṟaiva ṟa kūṭiyiruṉtu Āticaṇṭecuvaratevarkku nilavilaiyāvaṇam Ivvūr Irukkum paṇi makan tiripuvanamuṭaiyān Irājentracoḻanāna kulottuṅkacoḻa malaiyarājapanmar Ula kuyyakkoṇṭakā
makkoṭṭattu Eḻun=taruḷiyirukkum Umainaṅkai māṟṟukkum nilai nimantattukkum nilanimantattukkum nilaṅkoḷḷa tiyākavinotaṉ paṇṭārattu meṟpaṭiyārmāṭaiyokka kuṭiṉaikkallāl Oṭukkinapoṉ Irupattu nāṟkkaḻañcu Araiyum nāṅkaḷ kaikko
ṇṭu Ivvāticaṇṭecuvaratevarkku Ippe koṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka cantrātittavaṟ cācuvatiyamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattu kiḻpāṟ kkellai śrīmulastānamuṭaiyār nampi tirukkaḷ nilattukku meṟkkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Ālaṅkuḷattukkum kommaṭittiṭa
lukkum terkkum meṟpāṟkkellai śrīmulastāna ni lattukkuk kiḻakkum teṉpāṟkellai nāṭṭār vākkālukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicai nta perunāṉkellai Uḷ taṭi(yi)iraṇṭiṉāl kuḻi Āyiram Orunūṟṟu Irupattu Añci nāl nilam Araiyemākāṇi Iṉnam Ivar
kkeviṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkkellai taccaṉilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟ kellai Ālaṅkuḷattukkum kommaṭittiṭalukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai śrīmulattāna muṭaiyār teṟpuṟattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kalitiraṉ vāykkālukku teṟkku māka Ivvicaitta pe
runāṅkellaiyuḷ naṭu(va)vupaṭṭa kuḻi munṉūṟṟu Aimpatināle mummāvaraiyum Iṉnam Ivarkkey viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai teṟpputtukku meṟk kum teṉpāṟkellai cellūr Ellaikkum nāṭṭār vāykkālukkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai putukkuṭi vāykkālukku ki
ḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vāyaṟṟūr Ellai vāykkālukkum kalitiraṉ vāykkālukku teṟkkumāka Ivvicain=ta perunānkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa taṭiyiraṇṭināl 1 kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟuirupattu Aiñcināl nilam Eṭṭumākkāṇiyum Iṉnam Ivaṟke viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai tirumeṟ
koyil Āḻvār nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai kalitiravākkālukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai vāyaṟṟūr Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai keṅyilā ṉinttukkum tirumeykāvalp puṟattukkum vaṭṭamaṇiyāṉ nilattukkum teṟkkumāka Ivicain=ta perunānkellai Uḷ
naṭuvupaṭṭa taṭi Iraṇṭināl kuḻi muvāyiratturuṉūṟṟu Aimpatināl nilam Oṉṟarai ye Irumāvaraiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttukkoḷvatāna poṉ Irupattu ṉāṟ kkaḻañcarai Ippoṉ Irupattuṉāṟkkaḻañcaraiyum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kaic celavaṟakkoṇṭu ntrā dittavaṟ cācuvatikamāka Iṟaiyili paṇ
ṇik kuṭuttom Ivvāticaṇṭecuradevaṟkku Ipputukkuṭi sabhaiyom Iṉ nilattukku Ituvey vilai Āvatākavum Ituvey poruḷmāvaṟuti poruḷ cela volaiyāvatarakavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷ cela volai kāṭṭak kaṭavarallātāraākavum Ippaṭi Icaintu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷ
Aṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam cey tukuṭuttom cantrādittavaṟ cācuvatikamāka Iḻai yili paṇṇikkuṭuttom Āti caṇṭecuradevaṟkku Ipputukkuṭi sabhaiyom Iṉ nila ttu paṇṭu nirpāyum vāykkāla l nirpāyap peṟuvatākavum paṇṭu nir vārumpaṭi ye nirvāravum peṟuvatākavum ceynir veṭṭiyu
maṟṟum tiruvācalil poṉta kuṭimai ceyyak kaṭavarallātārākavum Ipparicicai [ ntu] vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ivvāticaṇṭecuvaradevaṟku Ipputukkuṭi sabhaikkuc camain=ta Uṟuppuṭṭur vāmana paṭṭaṉum Uṟuppuṭṭur nārāyaṇapaṭṭanum Iḻakkan=tiṟattu śrīnārasiṁhapaṭṭa
num Uṟuppuṭṭur kantaiya paṭṭanum kūvaṇṭur kovin=tapaṭṭaham Ivvaṉaivom Uḷḷiṭṭa sabhaiyom Ipparicu kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷap peṟuvārākavum Ipparicu Icaintu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Āticaṇṭecuradevaṟkku Uṟuppuṭṭur vāmanapaṭṭaṉum Uṟuppuṭṭur nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum Iḻakkaṉtiṟattu śrīnārasiṁhapaṭṭanum Uṟuppu
ṭ n=tayapaṭṭanum kūvaṇṭur kovin=tapaṭṭanum Ivvaṉaivom paṇiyāl I� sthan māttūruṭaiṅāṉ kovin=tan Apavaṉ Eḻuttu .. Uṟuppuṭṭur vāmana paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Uṟuppuṭuru nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Uṟuppuṭṭur kantaiya paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ivai Iḻukkaṉtiṟattu śrīnārasiṅhabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai kūvaṇṭurk kovintapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ivai Uṟuppuṭṭur vāmaṉa paṭṭan Eḻut Ivai kavuciyan Ātittan nāyapirān Eḻuttu Ivaikāśyapan cantiracekara Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven pāratāyan ninṟān viṟṟiruntān Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.586 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
